/Lotus/Weapons/VoidTrader/VTDetron.display_description: For Orokin-era smugglers, this fearsome handheld shotgun was a favored tool for 'dispute resolution'.

/Lotus/Weapons/VoidTrader/PrismaSkana.display_description: Forged from raw prisma crystals and infused with Void energy, this blade's pristine edge is honed razor-sharp to eviscerate even the most deadly of foes.

/Lotus/Weapons/VoidTrader/PrismaGrakata.display_description: Encased in plates refined from pure prisma crystals, this rare element gives this assault rifle a radiant luster.

/Lotus/Weapons/Thanotech/ThanoRifle/Than.display_description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy, oversized automatic rifle with withering fire that delivers rapid heat damage. Secondary fire unleashes an arcing projectile that ricochets off surfaces and enemies, exploding on every impact.

/Lotus/Weapons/Thanotech/ThanoPistol/Tha.display_description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. This large, weighty double-barreled pistol delivers twin projectiles that pack a punch, exploding on impact. Secondary fire puts the weapon in lock-on mode. Aim to lock onto multiple targets, then fire to unleash homing projectiles.

/Lotus/Weapons/Thanotech/EntratiWristGun.display_description: Albrecht's Void experiments revealed the true destructive potential of this weapon. In Incarnon form, draw in ambient power to deal steadily increased damage to enemies. At full power, release a blast of <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat.

/Lotus/Weapons/Thanotech/EntSphereHammer.display_description: Wield the timeless power of this mighty hammer. Heavy Attacks performed with Ekhein temporarily increase its Damage and Attack Speed.

/Lotus/Weapons/Thanotech/EntFistIncarnon.display_description: Albrecht's Void experiments revealed the true destructive potential of this fist weapon. In Incarnon form, perform Heavy Slams to impale nearby enemies with spikes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/Pistols/Hea.display_description: During parades and victory marches, the Laetum fired pigmented airburst rounds that rained onto festive crowds. The Orokin sent Laetum with the Zariman so they could properly celebrate a successful maiden voyage to Tau. There would be no such celebration, but the Void imbued the Laetum with a much more explosive capacity.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/Melee/Tonfa.display_description: Orokin elites admired farmers in conquered regions, because they had learned to fight with modified farming tools despite being forbidden to own weapons. For their voyage, the Zariman were presented with Praedos in recognition of Zariman tenacity. The Void reinforces the strength of the spirited individual by fortifying the Praedos.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/Melee/Heavy.display_description: The Thalys played a ceremonial role in the Zariman harvest festival, and was intended to reap the first fruits of Tau. Now twisted from this purpose, it plants Void shards in enemy flesh instead. Each new shard planted causes existing shards to inflict damage on their hosts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/Melee/Dagge.display_description: In the early Orokin Empire, elites wore Innodem as a symbolic reminder to defend the defenseless. The tradition fell out of style, but nostalgic elites acknowledged the sentiment in the form of a gift. The Void amplifies that ideal. Void energy strengthens Innodem gliding aerial attacks and the wielder is increasingly resilient as they perform finisher attacks in Incarnon Form.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/LongGuns/Se.display_description: Zariman colonists originally intended to use the Phenmor in burial rites. In Orokin society, the higher the rank, the greater number of volleys for the deceased. Its stock is carved from Phenaureus Pine, a tree designed to release seedlings only onto scorched earth. In the hands of the Void, the Phenmor becomes darkly aggressive.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Zariman/LongGuns/Pu.display_description: The Felarx invokes ancient times when aristocrats hunted game. For ceremonies, Orokin elites bred creatures reminiscent of game birds to reanimate cultural myths. They gave the Zariman crew Felarx and a brace of birds as a sign of acceptance into elite society. The brace of birds becomes a pair of pistols at the hands of the Void.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Ten.display_description: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Sta.display_description: Used by The Stalker, Despair throwing blades have a mono-filament edge, sharp enough to penetrate a Warframe.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Kun.display_description: Kunai throwing daggers offer a silent alternative to the traditional side arm. Perfect for assassins.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/U18.display_description: The claws of these tactical bombs dig into the target and detonate on command.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/TnO.display_description: Go on the hunt with Oraxia’s signature secondary. Fling a volley of toxin-laced barbs, or drop a cluster snare that scatters on impact, seizing nearby enemies and dragging them together.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/TnC.display_description:
In moments of despair, let the battle resonate with song. Cantare's blades lodge into the battlefield and return upon reload. When returning blades strike enemies, Cantare empowers allies with increased Reload Speed.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Sti.display_description: The remotely triggered Castanas quietly deliver a lethal dose of electricity to unsuspecting enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Pri.display_description: As deadly as any bullet without the associated noise or commotion.
These rare, braided throwing daggers were a favorite tool of high ranking Orokin assassins.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/LiD.display_description: A flash of red ribbon is the last thing most victims of these throwing-daggers see.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/ThrowingWeapons/Gla.display_description: Silently lacerate enemies with Gara's signature glass throwing knives. Increased Projectile Speed when wielded by Gara.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/ShotgunVand.display_description: A different take on a familiar shotgun, the Strun Wraith features unique styling.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/Shotgun.display_description: The Strun is a standard shotgun. Reliable, versatile and deadly.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/QuadShotgun.display_description: The Hek is a powerful shotgun that fires its shots with a tight spread, making it efficient at medium range as long as its strong recoil is properly managed.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/PrimeBoar.display_description: One of the finest examples of Tenno craftsmanship, the Boar Prime offers a higher Fire Rate, Magazine Capacity and a much higher per-shot damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/FullAutoSho.display_description: A shotgun with low accuracy and strong recoil, but able to deliver its payload in full-auto. The Boar is best used at close range.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Shotgun/DoubleBarre.display_description: Sobek is a rapid-firing Grineer shotgun that has reduced damage per shot but boasts extra large magazine capacity.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/VandalSniperR.display_description: A customized version of the elusive Snipetron, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/VIPRifle.display_description: A special version of the standard Braton rifle with a slower Fire Rate but offering higher accuracy and damage values. The Braton Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the grips.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/TennoSniperRi.display_description: A classic Tenno sniper rifle, the Vectis is ideal for ranged takedowns.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/TennoAR.display_description: Accuracy coupled with a massive magazine makes the Soma assault rifle a formidable weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/StartingRifle.display_description: The MK1-Braton is the standard issue rifle for all Tenno. A versatile weapon that can be customized to support a wide variety of play styles.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/SniperRifle.display_description: Manufactured by the Corpus, the Snipetron is a powerful and accurate rifle that sports optical zoom capabilities. Perfect for long range engagements.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/SemiAutoRifle.display_description: The Latron is a highly efficient rifle that performs well at medium and at long range, its accuracy making it a deadly weapon in the hands of skilled marksmen.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/Rifle.display_description: The Braton's high rate of fire and accuracy make it a favorite among the Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/LatronPrime.display_description: The ornamental Latron Prime exploits ancient Orokin technology to get a slight damage increase over the standard Latron.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/HeavyRifle.display_description: The Gorgon sports a large magazine that allows it to provide suppressing fire and sustain a high damage rate over a long time. Its high Fire Rate is only achieved following a short wind-up cycle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/BurstRifle.display_description: The Burston fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of automatic rifles and the accuracy of semi-automatic rifles.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/BratonPrime.display_description: A classic Orokin weapon, Braton Prime features modified damage levels and a larger magazine over the standard model.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Rifle/BoltoRifle.display_description: The Boltor fires slow, heavy bolts that are capable of impaling enemies to walls.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnYareliPis.display_description: Launch a volley of virulent, hyper-pressurized, water globules that envelope targets and explode with torrential force. Yareli's signature pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnWraitheSi.display_description: Sevagoth's wrist-mounted sidearm fires a chilling slow-moving slab, guaranteed to slow enemies for easier marksmanship. Charge the shot to fire a punishing high-velocity, high critical chance slab that punches through barriers. Deals additional headshot damage in Sevagoth's hands.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnPriestPis.display_description: Ring the death knell. Headshots briefly turn this scoped pistol into a rapid-fire, Critical Damage fiend that uses no ammo. When used by Harrow, Knell has a 2-round mag.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnOdaliskSm.display_description: With a high fire rate, ammo efficiency and rapid reload when emptied, this unusual sidearm can hand out carnage all day long. Ammo efficiency is further increased when Protea uses this, her signature weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnJetTurbin.display_description: Reverse-engineered from propulsion tech this hand-cannon packs a kick. Weak Point kills trigger Overdrive, locking off secondary functions while maximizing your fire rate and ammo efficiency for a short time.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnGuandoPis.display_description: Fires razor-sharp darts that anchor themselves in their target before erupting in a plume of toxic gas.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TnBardPisto.display_description: Octavia's pistol hammers foes with single shots or a rapid volley of bullets. When wielded by Octavia, alt-fire Headshot Kills increase Reload Speed.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TigrisRedee.display_description: The design of these hard-hitting dual pistols is a mix of organic and bladed elements.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/TennoUzi/Te.display_description: These diminutive rapid-fire Stiletto machine-pistols are just the right size to be akimbo style without sacrificing accuracy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/SundialGun/.display_description: This intricate automatic pistol is able to fire its magazine which then spins in the air for a short time, firing lasers at nearby enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/SomaSidearm.display_description: The devastating power of the Soma rifle compacted into two elegant pistols.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/SawnOffShot.display_description: Chew through the enemy with this vicious automatic hand shotgun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/SapientPist.display_description: Bombard legions of enemies with target seeking rockets. These dual launchers reload faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. Rockets arm after reaching a safe distance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/QuillDartgu.display_description: Heat, cold, electricity, or toxin: choose an element and launch a flurry of deadly quills. This versatile sidearm is Khora’s signature weapon and has a chance to instantly reload after headshots when she wields it.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeZylok/.display_description: A lightweight weapon that packs a punch worthy of its golden design.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeZakti/.display_description: A thousand pains, before their end.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeVelox/.display_description: This sidearm’s circular design evokes Protea Prime’s perception of time.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeVasto/.display_description: This elegant rapid-fire revolver is the embodiment of superior Orokin craftsmanship.
Orokin craftsmanship married with superior firepower. Dual Vastos, primed and ready to strike.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeSicaru.display_description: The Sicarus Prime is an ornamental firearm that fires rounds in rapid bursts, providing a balance between the lethality of auto-pistols and the accuracy of semi-automatic pistols.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimePyrana.display_description: Three kills in rapid succession to summon a second ethereal Pyrana for twice the deadly punch.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimePander.display_description: Pound the beat for a dance of death with Octavia's signature prime pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeMagnus.display_description: Orokin elegance meets formidable stopping power in this exquisite revolver. Hits have a chance to maximize Ammo Efficiency for a few seconds.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeLex/Pr.display_description: The Lex Prime is a powerful, accurate pistol that has a low Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity. Very efficient at long range.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeKompre.display_description: Glinting like a golden dawn, Yareli Prime’s signature pistol engulfs foes in a cascade of virulent, explosive, water globules. None can escape the sea.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeKnell/.display_description: Ring a funeral toll upon enemy skulls with Harrow Prime's signature pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeHystri.display_description: Versatile weapons complement deadly hunters. Khora Prime’s signature pistol rotates through hot, cold, electric, and toxic quills. When equipped on Khora, Hystrix Prime has a chance to instantly reload after headshots.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeEpitap.display_description: Send shivers down your enemies' spines with this wrist-mounted sidearm. As the signature weapon of Sevagoth Prime, it deals additional headshot damage when wielded by him.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeBallis.display_description: The beauty of this luxuriously gilded crossbow cannot obscure its lethal purpose.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAthoda.display_description: Unleash the song of the righteous warrior with this gilded pistol that goes into Overdrive on headshot kills, maximizing fire rate and ammo efficiency for a short time.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAkstil.display_description: Stylish, discreet and accurate, perfect for the Tenno of distinction.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAksoma.display_description: The elegant Aksomati precisely refined to this, their ultimate manifestation.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAkjaga.display_description: Precision machined mirrored pistols. Primed and ready.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAkbolt.display_description: Gilded rails adorn these two vicious bolt launching pistols.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/PrimeAkariu.display_description: Wield a golden pair of rocket launchers. Sprint to reload them faster. They reload fastest when wielded by Gauss.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/Magnum/Magn.display_description: The versatile Magnus revolver is a lethal sidearm for any Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/HarlequinGu.display_description: The choice weapon of Mirage, these fast-firing dual pistols deliver a deadly performance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/DexFuris/De.display_description: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/ConclaveLev.display_description: Hammer the enemy with this light-bodied heavy hitter. Featuring a double-action trigger that fires hard and fast.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/AutomaticHa.display_description: The Ballistica crossbow features a unique dual firing mechanism. Choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/AllNew1hSG/.display_description: Banshee Prime's signature shotgun is an instrument of devastation that fires both focused and broad shots.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistols/1999EntHybr.display_description: Never stop fighting, never run out of ammo. Temple's signature machine pistol was modified by Albrecht Entrati to warp fired bullets back into the magazine when reloaded.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/RevolverPist.display_description: Steady and reliable, the Vasto revolver combines speed and power for a classic gunslinger feel.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/Pistol.display_description: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/LatoVandal.display_description: A special version of the standard Lato pistol with a slower Fire Rate but offering higher Accuracy and Damage values. The Lato Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the grips.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/LatoPrime.display_description: The Lato is a highly accurate pistol used by the Tenno everywhere. Prime model offers slightly increased damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/HeavyPistol.display_description: The Lex is a powerful, accurate pistol that has a low Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity. Very efficient at long range.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/HandShotGun.display_description: The Bronco is a small-scale shotgun that can be wielded with one hand. Only effective at close range, it has a limited Magazine Capacity.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/CrossBow.display_description: The Bolto fires slow, heavy bolts that are capable of impaling enemies to walls.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/BurstPistol.display_description: The Sicarus fires 3-round bursts, which provides a balance between the lethality of auto-pistols and the accuracy of semi-automatic pistols.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/BroncoPrime.display_description: Infused with rare Orokin alloys, the Bronco Prime is a highly efficient weapon, trading an increased Magazine Capacity and damage for a lower rate of fire.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Pistol/AutoPistol.display_description: The Furis delivers a high damage output in a short time frame thanks to its high rate of fire.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Whips/SpiderW.display_description: Each lash of Oraxia's whip injects its victim with a dose of deadly toxin. Upon death, afflicted enemies have a chance to burst, damaging nearby enemies and spreading the poison.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Warfan/Warfan.display_description: Lacerate attackers with two razor sharp warfans.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Warfan/TnMoon.display_description: Unfurl this warfan like a rapidly waxing moon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Warfan/TnBrok.display_description: Flick away the enemy with this heavy warfan. The Quassus scatters ethereal daggers that are even more deadly accurate when wielded by Xaku.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Warfan/PrimeQ.display_description: Wield Xaku Prime’s elegant fan, its gilded edges crafted for both precision and prestige.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Warfan/PrimeG.display_description: Command the beauty and lethality of these ornate warfans.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Tonfa/TonfaCo.display_description: Ancient blades, perfected for today’s combat.
The Kronen resurrects a lethal fighting style once thought lost to the ages.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Tonfa/Boltonf.display_description: An intimidating Tonfa set designed to match the briary design of the Boltor.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/SwordsAndBoar.display_description: Argo & Vel bolster the warrior who stands fast. Its Heavy Attack sends forth a glaive that ricochets off enemies.
Deadly slashes from the Sigma sword are matched only by the force of the Octantis shield when thrown from the air.
Punish those who test your restraint. The first strike in a combo stuns enemies when Cobra & Crane Prime are wielded by Baruuk.
Baruuk's signature weapons: a sword for retribution, a shield for restraint. In Baruuk's hands, and his hands only, Cobra's first strike in a combo renders his foe unconscious.
Take active defense to new heights with this deadly flying shield and brutal blade. Throw the shield with a unique Heavy Attack, inflicting Blast Status Effects and dealing damage in a wide area.
This fiery sword and shield combination perfects the balance of Tenno offense and defense prowess. In the hands of a Master, even a defensive tool like a shield can be used as a weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/UmbraK.display_description: Forged of steel grafted from Umbra's flesh, this elegant Nikana unites with its Warframe to form a single being of seething purpose.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TnoRap.display_description: Elevate martial combat into an art form with this Tenno rapier.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TnTwoH.display_description: Fearsome and noble, the elegant two-handed Nikana is the pride of any Arsenal. Kills build charges and seeking projectiles are unleashed with a Slide Attack to find and stun unwitting enemies. When Revenant wields this blade, Tatsu's charge cap is increased.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TnRail.display_description: The steel flag of Old War Railjack crews, the Pennant was invaluable in repelling boarders. With each heavy attack kill the Pennant's speed of attack increases.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TnDaga.display_description: After 10 kills or assists, Dorrclave enters a spectral state that doubles weapon Follow Through and guarantees Status Effects for the next 10 attacks. In Dagath's hands, each active Status Effect heals her slightly.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TnChis.display_description: Tear and chew through enemies with this unusual crankshaft-style greatsword. When wielded by Grendel he is immune to staggers and knockdowns during heavy attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/ThreeL.display_description: The delicate form of this Tenno rapier conceals its ferocious and resilient force.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/TennoS.display_description: Perforate enemies with these two needle-sharp sai.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/Stalke.display_description: A fragment of Stalker's War sword, a symbol of his defeat.
The Stalker's sword as bestowed on him by the Sentient Hunhow.
In the practiced hands of a master, this blade and whip becomes exceedingly devastating.
Forged for veterans of the Scarlet Spear conflict, this Lacera has been modified to enhance nimbleness and lethality.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/QuillS.display_description: Tear through any target with these vicious, claw-like blades. The signature swords of Khora.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeW.display_description: The blade of the world-destroyer reaches its apotheosis, severing conflict itself. In forging this weapon, you have brought unrealized dreams to their ultimate conclusion.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeT.display_description: Tatsu Prime glows with spectral splendor. It grows more powerful with each enemy’s demise, especially when wielded by Revenant.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeP.display_description: A classic Tenno blade, beautifully reimagined.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeO.display_description: Enforce authority with these fine-edged sai blades.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeN.display_description: Forged by a forgotten master, these exquisite blades are bounty from a golden-age long gone.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeM.display_description: A greatsword for those with an insatiable hunger for victory. Grendel is immune to crowd-control when he performs Heavy Attacks with this weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeK.display_description: An ancient blade predating the fall of the Orokin Empire. Forged using techniques lost over the centuries, the edge remains sharper than that of any modern Nikana.
This master blade is the heavier, oversized and far more lethal version of the signature weapon of an extinct order of Tenno assassins.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeG.display_description: Born anew, the father of swords returns.
Only Tenno were strong enough to wield this noble beast of a weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PrimeD.display_description: The hunted will meet a quick end when faced with Khora Prime's signature swords. Heavy Attack Efficiency is enhanced when wielded by Khora.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/Plasma.display_description: An advanced blade that delivers high-damage attacks. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/Pangol.display_description: A unique blade used by an old Tenno clan.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/PRapie.display_description: Take mastery to the next level with this primed rapier.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/NWIIIO.display_description: The sword the fabled Orokin executioner Nihil used to glass the condemned. Swing while Aim Gliding to glass enemies. A Ground Slam will smash nearby glassed foes, while sending forward a narrow shockwave to shatter distant ones. A Heavy Slam sends forth a wider shockwave with greater force.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/KrisDa.display_description: Once the blade weapon of choice for an exclusive order of Tenno assassins, the Karyst dagger grew to become a symbol of honor and duty for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/Katana.display_description: The Dragon Nikana is forged from ancient Tenno steel. This is a master's weapon, only the most worthy of Tenno may wield it.
The Nikana reintroduces a lost Tenno blade and with it another fragment of the old ways.
A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the eleventh anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/JawSwo.display_description: A blade with a serrated edge that delivers strong quick attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/HeatSw.display_description: A strong blade capable of inflicting <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Damage to its foes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/GreatS.display_description: With massive charged power and the ability to hit up to five foes in a single swing, the Galatine sword is the heavy artillery of Melee Weapons.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/DexThe.display_description: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/DaxDuv.display_description: Azothane calls the visionary warrior to turn the tides of battle. Block and melee attack at the same time to plunge Azothane into the ground, damaging nearby enemies with a shockwave and adding to the combo counter.
Syam is at home in the hands of a focused warrior. Its Heavy Attacks send forth shockwaves.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/DarkSw.display_description: Use as a devastating heavy sword or apply a Dual Melee stance and split the weapon into two ferocious blades.

warnings: No usable behaviours were found; root statistics were used as fallback.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/DarkSw.display_description: A blade forged using dark metals, capable of delivering innate <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage with attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/Cutlas.display_description: Evoking the oceans of earth, this exquisite cutlass is a deadly work of art.
Like the surge and crash of storm waves, a master of the Nami cutlass and Skyla dagger turns these two separate weapons into one fluid attack.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Swords/CrpBig.display_description: Leverage bleeding-edge Granum tech with this massive heavy blade. Slam sends forth a cascading set of three shockwaves, while Heavy Slam unleashes a swath of shockwaves.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/SunDialAxe/Su.display_description: Scorch enemies with blistering blows, or set them ablaze with the flying fire disc.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/Staff.display_description: A two-handed, reinforced staff that can send multiple enemies airborne.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/SingleS.display_description: A lone Tenno once used this staff to fight back a horde of Infested.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/GrnStaf.display_description: Fashioned with Grineer materials and balanced for marine infantry use, the Amphis is a traditional staff weapon that has received a monstrous makeover that enables shock damage on jump attacks. Connects with multiple enemies with each strike.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/TipedoP.display_description: With their final breath they look to the moon, and are gone.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/PrimeBo.display_description: A classic Orokin weapon, Bo Prime creates elegant fury on the battlefield.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Staff/MonkSpa.display_description: With its crescent shaped blades flying in sweeping arcs and striking at tremendous speed, the Tipedo demands focus from those wishing to unlock its true power.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Soma/SomaDual.display_description: Razor sharp battle-hatchets, designed to compliment the Soma.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/Stalke.display_description: Hate is a scythe with a cruel blade, wielded by The Stalker.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/Reaper.display_description: Reaper Prime is an ornamental scythe, with a blade forged from tempered Rubedo.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/EtherS.display_description: With a blade forged from the same material as the Ether Sword, the Ether Reaper delivers quick death to its victims.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/TnChoi.display_description:
Harmony triumphs over hate. Heavy Attacks condense Status Effect damage into a single instance. Heavy Attack kills empower allies with increased Status Duration.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/PrimeV.display_description: Fashioned from the willingly donated bone of the Sentient Ur-Hatho and embellished by Orokin luxurator Sembik Vol, Venato Prime was to be wielded against “common enemies” of the united peoples – had any ever emerged from the darkness beyond Tau.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Scythe/ParisS.display_description: Reap havoc with this full sized Tenno-crafted scythe.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeVolnus/V.display_description: The glorious original Orokin casting of Gara’s signature glass hammer. Deceptively light and swift, while remaining lethally effective.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeVenKa/Pr.display_description: Gleaming blades of white draw blood of the deepest red.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeTekko/Pr.display_description: As merciless and indestructible as Atlas Prime himself, Tekko Prime crush and split with tectonic force.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeSilvaAeg.display_description: A perfectly crafted pairing, this mace and shield combination is sculpted for exhibition but balanced for the battlefield.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeNinkondi.display_description: An ancient weapon imbued with a new truth.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeKogake/K.display_description: Deliver a golden knockout with these prime Melee Weapons.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeFragor/P.display_description: A beautifully forged instrument of devastation.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PrimeDualKama.display_description: The sensual lines of these golden Kamas have long been celebrated as a masterwork of Tenno weapon smithing.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/Prim.display_description: Orthos Prime is an ancient Orokin martial weapon, forged from the purest Rubedo making it extremely light-weight.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/Pole.display_description: The Tenno forged Orthos is a rare double bladed polearm. Those who take the time to master it speak of its impressive striking distance and ability to hit multiple targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/TnHa.display_description: Light and nimble, the twin blades of this polearm will swoop and slice through throngs of hardened foes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/TnGu.display_description: Harvest the enemy with this towering polearm.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/Prim.display_description: That a god might reap a harvest of lives.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/Nagi.display_description: Roll Koumei's die with every 30 hits from Amanata to empower yourself with 1 of 5 Koumei blessings. Roll a 6 to receive all blessings at once.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/Flow.display_description: During the darkest days of the Old War many a Tenno relied solely on the Tonbo to keep them alive.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Polearms/DaxD.display_description: Edun befits a dextrous warrior. Heavy Attack to throw Edun. Edun explodes after it is embedded in an enemy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/PersianMachet.display_description: Each kill with this swooping blade adds bonus damage to the Djinn Sentinel’s next Fatal Attraction ability. In turn, Fatal Attraction bestows the weapon with a period of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Nunchaku/TnoN.display_description: With these blazing fast nunchaku, the enemy will never know what hit them.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Nunchaku/Nunc.display_description: With its lightning-fast strikes, the Ninkondi pays respect to the old ways.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Maces/Paladin.display_description: The Magistar mace wields justice and truth in the form of bone-crushing blows.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/LongSword/Ska.display_description: A basic blade known as a Skana. It is widely used by the Tenno. Prime model offers slightly increased damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/LongSword/Lon.display_description: Before all other weapons, Tenno master the Skana. This simple blade becomes immensely powerful in the hands of a master. For Tenno, it is the foundation of their fighting style and a pillar of their culture.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/LongSword/Eth.display_description: A single blade for more precision. The Ether Sword cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing’ infested allies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/HeavyScythe/T.display_description: The pride of one that knows their worth. Sirius' signature Heavy Scythe.
The wrath of one who knows revenge is all about timing. Orion's signature Heavy Scythe.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/HeavyScythe/D.display_description: This Heavy Scythe echoes battles of another time. It is far more a weapon of sheer force than one of finesse.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Hammer/Throwi.display_description: The signature weapon of the only lunatic fearsome enough to bust out of the Saturn Six Max-Pen. Once loosed this formidable throwing hammer always finds its way home.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Hammer/Hammer.display_description: A large two-handed hammer, the Fragor requires great strength to wield, but impacts with enough force to send groups of enemies tumbling.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Hammer/IceHam.display_description: Ice in motion can crush mountains, this frozen hammer is no different.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Hammer/GlassH.display_description: Tear and maim with this agile, lightweight glass hammer. When Gara's wields her signature melee weapon, it gains additional Slam Radial Damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Hammer/DaxDuv.display_description: A warrior who prefers brute force will make the most of Sampotes. Its Slams and Heavy Slams have an extended area of effect.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gunblade/TnoG.display_description: Striking with massive twin blades, the Redeemer fires the killing blow with its built-in shotgun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gunblade/Rede.display_description: Deal double-bladed, double-barreled death with this primed gunblade.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gunblade/Gunb.display_description: Makes sweeping cuts punctuated by bursts of heavy gunfire.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/GreatSword/Gr.display_description: The heavy two-handed sword known as Gram requires great strength to wield, but it is notorious for its splitting power. Can hit multiple targets with each strike.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Glaives/Teshi.display_description: Turn foes into puppets with Teshin’s versatile throwing disc.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Glaives/Prime.display_description: With heightened agility and power the Kestrel Prime's heavy attacks easily knock down foes, ensuring none shall stand before it.
The Glaive Prime is a deadly and beautiful weapon from the Orokin era. The blades are as effective in close quarters as they are when thrown at distant enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Glaives/Light.display_description: Dating back to the time of the first Tenno, the Glaive is a uniquely deadly weapon. This multi-bladed disc is not only effective for melee combat; it can also be thrown like a boomerang to cut down enemies at a distance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Glaives/Boome.display_description: The Kestrel boomerang is a heavy throwing weapon that can knock down enemies at a distance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gauntlet/Gaun.display_description: A pair of mighty gauntlets, the Ankyros were designed by the Tenno for close quarters combat. What they lack in range they make up for in speed.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gauntlet/Prim.display_description: This Orokin variation of the Ankyros is superior to its successor in every way.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Gauntlet/Braw.display_description: These iron fists that rip through foes are Atlas' signature weapons. When wielded by Atlas they receive a Status Chance increase.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Fist/FuraxWra.display_description: These Wraith gauntlets have been augmented for power.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Fist/Fist.display_description: These power gauntlets lack the range of most Melee Weapons, but Furax is far more devastating when you strike an enemy in close combat.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/DualShortSwor.display_description: A shorter Skana in each hand. Can hit multiple targets.
With a Heat Sword in each hand, enemies reach their fiery demise twice as fast. Can connect with multiple targets at once.
Fast and precise. The Dual Ether cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing' infested allies. Capable of hitting multiple targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/DualKamas/Sin.display_description: The Kama is a Tenno style hatchet, capable of making short work of any foe.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/DualKamas/Dua.display_description: Wielding a Kama in each hand brings a savage amount of <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Damage to bear against your enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/DualDagger/Fa.display_description: A set of ceremonial daggers from the Orokin era, the Fang Prime's blades resonate violently as they strike. This allows them to pierce hardened materials like armor with ease.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/DualDagger/Du.display_description: A shorter version of the Ether blade that allows for a more focused attack on a single target.
These matching stilettos have increased attack speed and can unleash a flurry of multi-hit attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Dagger/DarkDa.display_description: This short blade weapon forged using dark metals has limited range but comes out fast.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Dagger/Dagger.display_description: This short blade weapon has limited range but comes out fast and can inflict fire damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Dagger/Cerami.display_description: This short blade weapon was built using ceramic. It has limited range but comes out fast.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/CronusSword/P.display_description: The Dakra Prime is a Tenno forged weapon, crafted during the time of the Orokin. It is renowned for speed, power and the ability to hit multiple targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/CronusSword/C.display_description: A strong blade forged using ceramic.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Claws/TennoCl.display_description: Utilizing a new fighting stance, this Tenno weapon turns fists into claws and enemies into messy piles of meat and scrap metal.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/BrassKnuckles.display_description: These coverings for the hands and feet allow devastating high flying hand-to-hand combat attacks without risking harm to the user.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/WolfFrame.display_description: Mete out the sharp pain of justice. Heavy Slam attacks create a vortex that pulls in lifted enemies when the Sarofang’s Combo Multiplier builds to 8x. In Voruna’s hands, the Sarofang only requires a 5x Combo Multiplier to summon the vortex.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/PrimeVoru.display_description: Voruna Prime's signature axe is adorned with Orokin gold. She personally ensured that the former owners would have no further use for it.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/DualInfes.display_description: The fast and brutal Dual Ichor axes will quickly tear through enemies with a high probability of inflicting Critical Damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/DualAxeWe.display_description: Short axes held in each hand. High attack speed and can hit multiple targets. Delivers a high percentage of critical strikes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/AxeWeapon.display_description: The Scindo is a heavy war axe crafted by the Tenno. Reduced speed and agility is balanced by heavy, devastating strikes capable of connecting with multiple targets at once.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/PrimeZore.display_description: Axes worthy of an executioner, refined to Orokin perfection.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Melee/Axe/PrimeScin.display_description: An ancient executioners weapon, the honor of decapitation by the Scindo Prime was reserved for the Orokin's most respected enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/WraithLatr.display_description: The Latron Wraith is a powerful variation of the standard, semi-automatic rifle that features unique styling.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnoPrmryXb.display_description: Quickly fire off a volley of deadly bolts with the Attica repeating crossbow.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnoLotusPo.display_description: An energy projectile bursts forth from the Steflos and grows as it rushes toward enemies. The projectile's duration increases when it hits an enemy. When Citrine fires the Steflos, its projectile speed increases.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnoLeverAc.display_description: This Tenno crafted, lever action rifle, is equal parts elegance and executioner.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnWispRifl.display_description: Strike with silent lightning or the pummeling drum of thunder. Alternate between stealthy short-range electrical discharge, and automatic lightning gun. Faster mode-switch when used by Wisp.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnSMG/TnSM.display_description: Make easy prey of enemies with this quiet, agile, and pinpoint accurate Tenno submachine gun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnRifleErs.display_description: This unusual automatic rifle feels strangely familiar and has two fire modes. Primary fire packs radiation damage. Alternate fire charges up to launch an explosive projectile.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnRevolver.display_description: Precise calibration, rapid trigger-pull and a steady hand all combine to bring down the hardiest prey on two legs or four.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnRailjack.display_description: The Quellor was standard-issue to Dax Railjack crews of the Old War, dating back to the earliest, pre-Sigma craft. A rapid-fire assault rifle with a hefty magazine-size, the Quellor is an all-round workhorse. Also capable of large, short-range cryo-blasts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnQuadSnip.display_description: Like a breath of wind, shots fired by this multi-barrel sniper are felt but never seen by its targets. Headshots in quick succession increase the Perigale's ammo efficiency. When the Perigale is wielded by Voruna, its ammo pool increases.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnPriestSp.display_description: Blast targets with corrosive plasma projectiles, or toss the scepter to inflict an energy field upon nearby enemies that amplifies their brain waves to attract bullets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnModQuest.display_description: A sturdy burst-rifle of considerable age and unknown origin collected by Teshin during his many years wandering the Origin System.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnInkRifle.display_description: Turn the enemy's worst nightmare into reality with Follie's signature rifle. The Enkaus will instantly kill and dissolve inked enemies that are damaged at low health. Shooting inked enemies siphons ink back into the Enkaus, allowing for a constant flow of creative destruction.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnHopliteS.display_description: Styanax’s speargun matches his might. Throw Afentis to pin an enemy and nearby enemies will also be stunned. Throw Afentis onto the ground to buff nearby allies with Ballistarii Might. The buff increases reload speed, fire rate, and ammo pools and reduces recoil. Allies who kill enemies with Ballistarii Might maintain the buff temporarily when they move away from Afentis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnHeavySho.display_description: Deliver a massive punch with each blast of this shotgun, or launch a round that explodes mid-air knocking down nearby enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnGlassSho.display_description: Blast enemies with glass slugs that devastate on impact. In Gara's hands, this signature weapon has a larger Ammo Pool.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnBeltFedR.display_description: Cyte-09's signature rifle is an ideal match for forceful gunners. A precisely timed reload increases reload speed and infuses the new magazine with Heat Damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnBardRifl.display_description: Unload percussive machine gun fire, or strike a heavy chord with a single charge shot. When Octavia wields her signature rifle alt-fire Headshot Kills have a chance to instantly refill the magazine.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TnAlchemis.display_description: Launch a glaive that ricochets off surfaces in bursts of elemental damage, then perforate enemies with primary fire’s precision buck-shot. Damage increases with each Status Effect afflicting a target. Lavos will transmute a small portion of any ammo pickup to Primary Ammo when wielding his signature Cedo.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/TennoTommy.display_description: A high-capacity, high-damage enforcer, this weapon can switch between the high crit semi-automatic and full automatic firing modes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/SapientPri.display_description: Using a barrage of rapid-fire plasma rockets, Gauss’ signature weapon lays down a path of destruction. Reloads are faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. For safety, rockets arm after traveling a safe distance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/RubicoPrim.display_description: For the hunter, the apex of the sniper's art. For the hunted, a gateway to the next life.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/RevenantSh.display_description: Irradiate enemies with a continuous stream of deadly plasma. Charging secondary fire releases a glob of plasma that erupts with homing bomblets on impact. Increased Magazine Capacity when wielded by Revenant.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/RepeatingC.display_description: This devastating automatic crossbow is the perfect marriage of ancient Earth weaponry and Tenno technology.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeZhuge.display_description: Tenno artistry. Ancient craft. A weapon of surgical precision and devastating effect. Each bolt fired by Zhuge Prime explodes shortly after embedding.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeVecti.display_description: Once thought destroyed, the newly uncovered Vectis Prime revives Tenno martial traditions.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeTrumn.display_description: Sleek lines and golden accents define this masterpiece of the illustrious Entrati family.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeTigri.display_description: An artifact of exquisite beauty. A weapon of deadly purpose.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeTiber.display_description: Art meets ingenuity with this beautifully deadly rifle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeTenor.display_description: Add lethal staccato percussion to Octavia's melodies with this masterpiece assault rifle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeSybar.display_description: Sleek and slender, a golden symbol of Tenno perfection.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeStrun.display_description: A classic shotgun design, embellished for the elite as only the Orokin could.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeStrad.display_description: Between measured staccato and staggering crescendo, Stradavar Prime never fails to call down a devastating finale.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeSoma/.display_description: Known for taking down whole squads with its single massive magazine, few weapons were as feared as the Prime Soma.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeScour.display_description: Smite the unrighteous with Harrow Prime's signature speargun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimePhant.display_description: Phantasma Prime is burnished with deadly force. In Revenant’s hands, it has increased magazine capacity. The might of its irradiated plasma is reminiscent of the fearsome Eidolon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimePerig.display_description: The one who exalted Voruna to her Prime form imbued her signature sniper rifle with increased magazine size and ammo capacity, as if to arm her for a long hunt.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimePanth.display_description: The max-velocity saw-launcher perfected. Features a larger magazine, faster fire rate, and a radial, slashing ricochet.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeNagan.display_description: A golden version of Garuda's versatile crossbow, as fashioned by the Orokin's finest weaponsmiths. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status, and Headshot kills have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda the Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeLight.display_description: Caliban Prime's signature sniper rifle is no mere ceremonial weapon. A sign, perhaps, that peace between Orokin and Sentient was destined to be fleeting. Struck enemies become lightning rods, with a chance to attract bolts of chain lightning that can jump to nearby enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeFulmi.display_description: Wield a storm. Fulmin Prime's electric rounds switch between lightning beams and short-range bursts. Wisp quickly swaps between each mode with her elemental prowess.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeCorin.display_description: Heavy in the hand with a bone-crunching kickback. This Prime version of this shotgun adds remote detonation of the weapon's airburst round.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeCedo/.display_description: A golden shotgun, forged for those who deliver judgment.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeBurst.display_description: Once thought lost to the ages, attempts to reengineer the Burston Prime never fully replicated this weapon's power and agility.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeBolto.display_description: Fires Orokin designed bolts that are faster and sharper.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeBaza/.display_description: This rapid-fire classic is the Orokin-engineered definition of silent, pinpoint lethality.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeAstil.display_description: Loose explosive glass slugs that tear through enemies with Gara’s signature shotgun, presented here in its spectacular Prime form.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeAlter.display_description: Orokin gold enhances the conductivity of Gyre Prime's signature rifle, enabling it to fire massive electrifying orbs.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeAfent.display_description: The gilded speargun of Styanax Prime shines like a beacon across the battlefield, invigorating allies and stunning enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PrimeAccel.display_description: Engage your enemies with deadly speed. This weapon reloads even faster when its wielder sprints, faster still with Gauss.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/PaxDuviric.display_description: Kullervo's signature weapon boasts melee synergy. Every shot that lands increases the wielder's Melee Combo count. When Kullervo wields Rauta, it also increases his Melee Combo duration.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/Miter/TnoM.display_description: Firing high-velocity blades, this weapon can also be used as a battle-saw, shredding anything unfortunate enough to get within range.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/LoginPrima.display_description: Deploy the radar disc to reveal hidden enemies and then strike with precision shots that punch through all obstacles in the way.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/GyreRifle/.display_description: Gyre's signature weapon has two fire modes. Primary fire shocks enemies with electrical orbs. Alternate fire is a large ball of electricity that sticks to any surface and pulses <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity before it explodes. In Gyre's hands, the weapon has a small amount of multishot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/Gunbrella/.display_description: Depend on Higasa when it rains bullets. Aiming creates a shield that blocks weapon fire. Kills and blocked shots charge a beam released by Alternate Fire.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/GarudaCros.display_description: Slash targets with a single precise bolt from Garuda's signature crossbow. Alt-fire to let loose a barrage of bolts. All bolts have a chance to cause <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status, and Headshots have a chance to increase Reload Speed. When wielded by Garuda Nagantaka gains a slight Punch Through.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/FiveShotSn.display_description: Scope out the enemy with this long-range revolver style rifle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/DrakeRifle.display_description: Forged by a master gunsmith, this Tenno burst rifle will strike down targets with swift precision.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/DoubleBarr.display_description: The double-barreled Tigris shotgun fires two bursts in rapid succession, easily taking down the toughest prey.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/LongGuns/DexTheThir.display_description: A gift from the Lotus to commemorate the third anniversary of the first Tenno waking from Cryo stasis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Grimoire/TnGrimoire.display_description: Claim the power of Albrecht Entrati's knowledge. Customize the Grimoire with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Its alternate attack releases a voltaic orb with guaranteed <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity Status.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Grimoire/TnDoppelga.display_description: Claim the power of Albrecht Entrati's knowledge. Customize the Grimoire with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Its alternate attack releases a voltaic orb with guaranteed <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR>Electricity Status.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/StalkerBow.display_description: Dread is the calling card of The Stalker. It fires arrows that can decapitate.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/PrimeHuntingBo.display_description: Discovered deep inside an ancient Orokin derelict, the Paris Prime increases the kinetic energy of any bolt it fires, dealing more damage than its more common counterpart.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/HuntingBow.display_description: Based on one of the world's oldest weapon designs, this Tenno-crafted weapon can be used both in stealth and in open combat. The Paris uses a chargeable magnetic field to launch arrows capable of impaling enemies to walls.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/TnChoirBow/TnC.display_description:
Counter the dread of battle with a song of praise. Enemies cannot hurt your allies while wounded by Evensong's arrows. Kills with Evensong empower ally weapons with Multishot.

Experience the true power of Jade's Ensemble when Evensong, Cantare, and Harmony sing together.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/PrimeDerelictC.display_description: Each arrow spawns a swarm of sticky appendages on impact. These tongue-like probes latch onto nearby unfortunates and drag them close before bursting into a mess of diseased goo.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/PrimeDaikyu/Pr.display_description: Long believed lost, the mighty Daikyu Prime was the pride of many a Tenno dojo. Designed to strike the foe where they are weakest, its powerful shots repay careful marksmanship.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/PrimeCernos/Pr.display_description: A noble bow to hunt hellish beasts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/Omicrus/Omicru.display_description: Hunhow’s gift, carved from the bones of his kin. Shots can be charged and held; release them just before full charge for maximum effect.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/DaxDuviriAsyme.display_description: The versatile Cinta can fire arrows in quick succession, quickly charge a shock wave, or fully charge a powerful focused shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/AsymetricalBow.display_description: Daikyu takes great strength to draw back, but provides added power and range to every shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bows/AntlerBow/Antl.display_description: Evoking the design of ancient bows, the high impact Cernos is perfect for hunting down highly shielded enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Bayonet/TnBayonetRi.display_description: Bring hell to the battlefield with Uriel's signature rifle and bayonet combination. Occupying both primary and melee slots, this unique weapon blends precision marksmanship with unrelenting melee combat.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Tn.display_description: From death blooms the Larkspur. A unique and menacing Archgun with a wild initial attack that locks onto a target then chains other targets close to the first. It also sports an explosive projectile mode. In Hildryn's grip the Larkspur carries more reserve ammo.

Mandonel fires <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage projectiles. Partially charged shots release a spread and fully charged shots release a beam that dissolves into a radiation field. Projectiles that pass through the field are empowered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Th.display_description: Blast through enemies with a double-barreled shot of energized slugs. This siphons their life essence which is then used to generate the secondary fire's massive air-burst mortar. The ancient Entrati weapon was built for Necramechs but also functions as an Archgun.

An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati for use by their Necramechs. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. Punishing automatic primary fire and a secondary mode that charges up to unleash a destructive beam of energy with a large explosion at point of impact.

An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati for use by their Necramechs. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. A heavy flamethrower with surprising range. Secondary fire launches three projectiles in a fan pattern that explode, leaving a damaging area of effect for a short duration.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Ro.display_description: An Archwing energy weapon that sends waves of deadly plasma crashing into enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Re.display_description: Shatter your targets with explosive shells from this devastating Archwing cannon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Ra.display_description: When fully charged, the magnetized barrel of the Velocitus accelerates a metal slug to tremendous speeds, piercing hulls and obliterating armor.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Pr.display_description: Embrace pandemonium. Chainfire and explosive potential meet in Larkspur Prime. Hildryn packs more ammo when she wields this mighty weapon.
Flaunting ceremonial beauty, this arch gun flak cannon is even more devastating than its standard issue counterpart.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/No.display_description: Nokko’s signature archgun fires six homing missiles, each bearing a payload of one of the six combined elements which detonate in an area upon impact.

warnings: Behaviour 0 has no recognized damage components.
No usable behaviours were found; root statistics were used as fallback.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/La.display_description: When fully charged, this flak cannon delivers a devastating shot. Perfect for taking down fast-moving interceptors.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Fo.display_description: The Imperator Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the barrel.
A long range rifle capable of firing in space, the Imperator's versatility makes it an ideal weapon for space combat.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Primary/Ar.display_description: Delivering twin streams of highly accurate, rapid-fire ordnance, the Decurion are specifically designed for combat in the vacuum of space.

Colder than space and less forgiving, Prisma crystals bring elite efficiency to the already sleek Dual Decurion. Requiring the lightest of touches to reload, these twin archguns prove that heavy weaponry can still possess elegance.
Devastate free-space enemies with Phaedra, the Soma's big-sister.
Unload deadly accurate bursts of mayhem.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Melee/Void.display_description: A rare object of beauty, this Archwing sword has been sheathed in prisma crystal and baptized in the Void’s energy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Melee/GrnA.display_description: Gallium-alloy gauntlets for close-range Archwing combat. Designed by the infamous Tyl Regor.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Melee/Exal.display_description: Heavy attacks briefly transform the Corufell into a Gunblade. After the Gunblade fires, the Corufell returns to its Heavy Scythe state. Its transformation is fastest in Citrine's hands.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Archwing/Melee/Arch.display_description: Part sword, part shield, the Centaur excels at charging headlong into enemy fire.
Weightless space turns this impossibly massive sword into an agile instrument of destruction.
This laser bladed battle-axe easily hacks through a ship's defenses and the forces protecting it.
Tear apart incoming enemies with this massive hooked blade.
Become an angel of death, with this Archwing scythe.
Using Archwing's jets for thrust, this massive hammer crushes anything in its path.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/PrimeAkimboS.display_description: Used together, these Orokin pistols feed off each other, inflicting greater damage with an enhanced status chance for inducing elemental effects on targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/DualVastos.display_description: Vasto revolvers equipped in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/DualMagnusPr.display_description: Fill your fists with golden cannons of fury. This refined design unlocks quicker handling and higher critical chance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/DualMagnus.display_description: Twice the ammo and twice the stopping power of a single Magnus.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkimboViperP.display_description: A Viper equipped in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkimboShotGu.display_description: A Bronco equipped in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkimboPistol.display_description: A Lato equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and Fire Rate, but Reload time is doubled and Accuracy is lowered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkimboBolto.display_description: A Bolto equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and slightly faster Fire Rate, but reload time is doubled and accuracy is lowered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkimboAutoPi.display_description: Furis pistols equipped in each hand. Twice the Magazine Capacity and slightly faster Fire Rate, but Accuracy and Reload Speed are lowered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkLexPrimePi.display_description: Savage the enemy with a Lex Prime in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Tenno/Akimbo/AkLexPistols.display_description: Dual Lex pistols double the amount of high caliber lead you can throw at the enemy, but accuracy and reload time suffer.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/SteelMeridian/.display_description: Taken from defeated Grineer commanders and rebuilt to improve combat efficiency and reliability.
Justice blinds. Block hits to charge a Radial Blind, when fully charged Block+Heavy Attack to unleash it.
Forged in the fires of rebel struggle, this shotgun is a force for liberation.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/RedVeil/Pistol.display_description: This modified ballistica is the weapon of choice used by Red Veil Assassins to take out high-priority marks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/RedVeil/Melee/.display_description: Infiltrate undetected; reduced visibility when held. Then strike with confidence; hits to irradiated targets restores shields and creates overshields.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/RedVeil/Bows/R.display_description: A finely tuned instrument of assassination.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/PerrinSequence.display_description: The favored side-arms of Perrin Sequence executives, these pistols have been modified to improve efficiency and killing potential.
Whip the enemy out of their ill-gotten gains; double credit drops on kills.
Ruthless and efficient, just like the free-market.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/NewLoka/Pistol.display_description: This remotely detonated electrical trap is used by devotees of New Loka to protect their temples and shrines.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/NewLoka/Melee/.display_description: Each charged attack turns the enemy’s pain into a healing pulse that washes over allies. Also, creates resistance to Status Effects when held.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/NewLoka/LongGu.display_description: Echo nature's violent beauty with this special Tigris.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/CephalonSuda/P.display_description: Deployed by the Cephalon Suda, once a data-analyzing instrument the Gammacor main focus is defense.
Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/CephalonSuda/M.display_description: This intelligent hammer takes an enemy killed by a Heavy Attack and recomposes them as an ally. Any fatal strike with this weapon also performs a Codex scan.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/CephalonSuda/L.display_description: Cephalon Suda's custom issue Simulor was built to satisfy her curiosity.

warnings: Behaviour 0 has no recognized damage components.
No usable behaviours were found; root statistics were used as fallback.

/Lotus/Weapons/Syndicates/ArbitersOfHexi.display_description: For the Arbiters of Hexis these pistols are more than simple weapons, they are symbols of truth and discipline.
Spinning attacks unleash the Stormpath, a tempest of mayhem that hurls any foes in its way.
Bring down judgement, with this boltor crafted by the Arbiters of Hexis.

/Lotus/Weapons/Sentients/Shedu/SheduHeav.display_description: This arm-cannon, ripped from a Sentient, rapid-fires thermal pulses that explode in an electrical blast. Features an ammo-less quick charge capacitor, that emits a knock-back pulse and strips Sentient damage resistances when fully discharged.

/Lotus/Weapons/Sentients/SentRifleNewWar.display_description: This Sentient war instrument can either barrage targets with explosive bolts or draw on its regenerative battery to create twin plasma beams that chain through targets. When fully drained, Health is leeched from nearby foes for a short period.

/Lotus/Weapons/Sentients/SentOctaMiniGun.display_description: Deliver a ruthless barrage of Sentient artillery from this instrument of death. Alt-fire splits the weapon apart into 8 separate rifles, expanding its devastation by tracking up to 4 targets at once, while consuming more ammo per shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Sentients/SentJointedScyt.display_description: Caliban’s signature scythe, forged from a limb wrenched off a fallen Eidolon centuries ago. 50% increased Melee Combo Counter Chance when wielded by Caliban.

/Lotus/Weapons/Orokin/BallasSword/Ballas.display_description: The Sentient slayer. An offering from Ballas.

/Lotus/Weapons/Operator/Pistols/DrifterP.display_description: A silent, pistol-style Amp for the Drifter. Generates its own ammunition from Void energy. A precisely timed reload over-charges the next shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Operator/Melee/DrifterTaz.display_description: An electrified jolter for quick melee takedowns, assembled from scavenged scrap. Ideal for use on unsuspecting opponents.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Strun.display_description: The Strun is a standard shotgun. Reliable, versatile and deadly.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Paris.display_description: The MK1-Paris is the standard issue bow for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Kunai.display_description: The MK1-Kunai is the standard issue throwing knives for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Furis.display_description: The MK1-Furis are the standard issue automatic pistol for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Furax.display_description: The MK1-Furax is the standard issue fist weapon for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/MK1Series/MK1Bo.display_description: The MK1-Bo is the standard issue staff weapon for all Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/LasSilencedPistol/.display_description: A true masterpiece of Höllvanian engineering, Vesper 77's advanced laser sight highlights enemy Weak Points with precision. Aim to increase its Critical Damage Multiplier.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/LasGrenadeLauncher.display_description: Put them down so that they stay down, with this Scaldra slug launcher.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/LasGooSickle/LasGo.display_description: Reap what the Techrot have sown with this vicious pair of Scaldra hand-scythes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/LasGooPistol/LasGo.display_description: The standard issue personal Efervon projector, as sported by all ranks of Scaldra.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/LasGooAK/LasGooAKP.display_description: Perforate Techrot, and anyone else who stands in your way, with this Scaldra machine gun. Alternative fire pummels targets with Efervon laced buckshot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Lasria/AK47/TC2024AK47Wea.display_description: This pre-Orokin weapon earned its popularity for its reliability in tough conditions. When hip-firing, its Ammo Efficiency increases. When aiming, headshots have a high Critical Chance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Pistols/Infested.display_description: A living weapon, the infested Embolist pistol kills its victims with an acidic venomous gas.
The Tysis pistol spits out caustic darts that corrode their victims from within.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Pistols/InfVomit.display_description: Brain-strikes excite this bioweapon, causing it to rapidly release toxic munitions.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Pistols/InfUzi/I.display_description: Infect your foes with this spore-scattering pistol. Headshots burrow in and explode, releasing spore clouds that seek out nearby enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Pistols/InfProxi.display_description: These festering sacs of pus and gas burst violently on impact.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Pistols/InfBeamP.display_description: Splatter enemies with a short-range stream of corrosive bile and then toss the ammo bladder as a grenade when reloading. The emptier the pistol’s ammo bladder, the more potent its damage. A fully empty bladder packs the biggest punch.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Whip/Infes.display_description: The Scoliac Whip is a nasty parasitic growth of sinew and bone that can inflict heart stopping <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage with attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/TipedoStaf.display_description: An instrument of unrelenting harm. If Lesion tastes blood, it becomes invigorated with faster Attack Speed and increased <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Swords/Mir.display_description: A relic from the Great Plague, the Mire Infested Sword is a brutal weapon. It not only cuts into the enemy, it infects the wounds of its victim with a toxic nerve poison. Deals <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage on Ground Slam attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Swords/Mio.display_description: This bone-forged sword includes a tendon-whip to distract and maim the enemy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Staff/InfS.display_description: A two-pronged attack; the bone-grafted cocoon at the tip of this polearm rends flesh, while the viral mass living within spreads itself into the wounds of each new victim.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Nunchaku/I.display_description: Pummel and infect with these two pulsating hunks of flesh connected by a ligament. Take-hold of the malignant evolution of an ancient martial weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/InfWarfan/.display_description: Slash through enemies with two leaves of the exceedingly rare Arum Spinosa plant. Heavy Attack to whip a flurry of toxic spines at ranged attackers.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/InfWFAccom.display_description: Rip into the enemy with fists of razor sharp cartilage. Steals health with each critical hit.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/InfTransfo.display_description: Leave your mark with these infected claws with increased heavy attack range. Heavy attack at max combo to keep the extended range and slam radius for 3 minutes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/InfEmbolis.display_description: Heavy attacks from this scythe unleash a wave of acid that mutilates enemies and leaves a trail of corrosive sludge.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/InfBoomera.display_description: Each strike of this infested glaive infects its target with viral pathogens. Occasionally, it discharges the spores of rabid, enemy-seeking maggots, either in-flight or on contact with the enemy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Melee/Glaives/Pu.display_description: Twisted and tortured from exposure to the Infestation, this glaive becomes an absolute predator in the hands of the right Tenno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/Infeste.display_description: Powered by a bio-chemical reaction, the Infested Synapse rifle fries its targets with a steady stream of <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive energy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/Tentacl.display_description: Fires seven beams of continuous biochemical energy which depletes the life of any surface they contact.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/QuantaF.display_description: Completely overwhelmed by Infested biology, this former Quanta now fires organic ordnance and a harpoon like appendage.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/InfWFAc.display_description: A bloodsucker. This symbiotic burst-rifle leeches health to forge its ammo and then restores health with each headshot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/InfSnip.display_description: This long-distance rifle fires a razor-sharp, virus-soaked barb that continues to attack its host before violently erupting in a spore-laden mist. Scoped headshots increase lethality.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/InfCrpS.display_description: A bizarre union of Corpus technology and Infested biology, this automatic rifle can also deploy an irradiated airborne infested mass. Further field testing is required to fully understand the potential of this weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/LongGuns/InfArmC.display_description: Rain down a triple volley of explosive disease bladders from a distance, then move in for the kill by unloading a multi-shot barrage of toxic barbs with primary fire.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/InfestedLich/Pis.display_description: The Technocyte virus has contorted this Tysis into a more lethal weapon. With increased Damage, Critical Chance, Critical Damage and Magazine Capacity.
These festering, writhing, throwable projectiles of pus and gas have been improved with a greater Magazine Size, Critical Chance, Critical Damage, Status Chance, and Damage.
When the magazine reaches empty and is manually reloaded, the Coda Catabolyst launches not one but three powerful grenades. Also has a higher Status Chance, Damage, and Magazine Size.

Get the job done right with a pair of spore flinging terror tools. Inflicts a spore that spreads to nearby enemies on death causing <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold Status Effect and increased vulnerability to damage from the Torxica.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/InfestedLich/Mel.display_description: The Plague Year of 1999 will never be the same. With improved Critical Multipler, Critical Chance, and Status Chance, the Technocyte virus has turned the Coda Mire into a truly horrifying blade.
Rip and shred your enemies to pieces with the Coda Hirudo. With improved Damage, Status Chance, Critical Chance, and Critical Damage.
Drive home the pain with this hammer evolved from a scooter assembly. The wheel shapeshifts and gains a unique buff to match whatever type of physical damage it has been modded for.

Enhanced by Technocyte mutations, the Coda Pathocyst comes with increased Damage, Critical Chance, Critical Damage and Status Chance. While in-flight or on contact with the enemy, it will occasionally spawn enhanced, enemy-seeking miasmites.
The Coda Caustacyst scythe is a force to be reckoned with, the Technocyte virus honing it with improved Damage, Status Chance, and Critical Damage, as well as acid pools with longer duration.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/InfestedLich/Lon.display_description: Firing a nonstop stream of vile corrosive gastric juice, the Coda Synapse comes with increased Magazine size, Beam Length, Status Chance, Punch Through, and Damage.
Delivers a virus-laden barb to its victim that continues to damage it before exploding. With increased Damage, Reload Speed, Magazine Size, Status Chance, and explosion radius.
The Technocyte virus did nothing but increase the Hema’s thirst for blood. With increased Fire Rate, Magazine Size, Critical Chance, Critical Damage, Status Chance, and Damage.
With increased magazine size, the Coda Bubonico was born of the Technocyte virus' need to spread infection. Primary Fire rate ramps up with continuous fire.

Amplify shockwaves of devastating sound with this Technocyte virus infested shotgun that hungers for blood, and desires nothing more than to feed upon its enemies. Alternative fire at enemies not vulnerable to Mercy Kills to swarm them with infested mites, while firing at vulnerable ones will perform a ranged execution.

warnings: Behaviour 1 has no recognized damage components.

/Lotus/Weapons/Infested/Bow/InfCernosBow.display_description: Overcome with Infestation, this bow's arrows now spread poisonous contagion to any surface they hit.
