/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/ThrowingWeapons/G.display_description: What the Aegrit lacks in quantity it makes up for in destructive power. Toss the Aegrit onto your enemy’s position then detonate remotely at the right moment for maximum destructive effect.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/WraithTwi.display_description: The uniquely styled Twin Vipers Wraith are a powerful variation on the standard akimbo machine-pistols.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/WraithSin.display_description: The uniquely styled Viper Wraith is a powerful variation on the standard machine-pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/HeatGun/G.display_description: This particle cannon generates a condensed beam of super-heated plasma designed to melt rock to ore, and enemies to molten slag.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnUzi/Gr.display_description: Inflict rapid-fire bursts of pain with this Grineer submachine gun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnTorped.display_description: Rain hell on the enemy with this handheld cluster-rocket launcher.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnQueenG.display_description: These twin barrels of destruction are the signature pistols of the Kuva Guardians.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnOrokin.display_description: The sidearm of choice for Prime Grineer warriors, Sagek Prime blends Grineer brutality with Orokin aesthetics. When Sagek Prime inflicts a critical hit, its next shot has a chance to gain significant Status Chance.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnKohmPi.display_description: Like the larger Kohm, this hand-shotgun doubles its volley with each successive shot.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnDWUniq.display_description: Doubling their volley on each successive shot, the Twin Kohmaks decimate foes in seconds.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrnAmphis.display_description: A compact four-barreled design packing a self-charging capacitor that discharges upon every reload from empty. Features auto hip-fire and aimed fire is semi-auto, four-shot instant burst.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrineerMi.display_description: Creates and focuses a high-frequency field of microwaves, literally cooking the target from within.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrineerLe.display_description: The Marelok combines the stopping power of a rifle with the portability of a pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrineerHa.display_description: Simple but powerful. The semi-automatic Brakk hand cannon delivers a lot of punch in a small package.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrineerCr.display_description: Firing a sticky, toxic, explosive compound, the Stug Gel Gun offers multiple ejection modes, delivering maximum damage in all situations.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Pistols/GrineerBu.display_description: Fused with prisma crystals, these pristine Grineer sidearms are sure to intimidate any foe.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/Tonfa/GrnCh.display_description: Rend enemies and up the heat with these mining tools repurposed into machine-tonfa. Building the Combo Multiplier overheats the Tonkkatts, setting enemies ablaze.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/Scythe/GrnD.display_description: Orokin-era Grineer plated their scythes with gold as a symbol of dedication to their Golden Lords. Gains a percentage of Critical Chance with each Status Type affecting the target.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GunBlade/Gr.display_description: Slash and blast with this heavy Gunblade of brutal Grineer design. High slash damage paired with a heavy shotgun attack.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnTrident/.display_description: Inflict maximum devastation with this massive Grineer trident.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnSparring.display_description: When they go high, go low. Powerful pneumatic grips and toecaps amplify every blow. Four ways to deal twice the pain.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnSharbola.display_description: The Slaytra is a powerful reiteration of the traditional Grineer Machete that doubles the duration of <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effects.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnQueenSce.display_description: A shattered talisman of the Grineer Elder Queen. It pulls health orbs from deceased enemies and energy orbs from destroyed robots.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnKuvaLich.display_description: A crushing, killing, rocket-powered stab-hammer. Grineer, naturally.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnKusariga.display_description: Overwhelm hostiles with this jet-powered sickle and razor-chain weapon. Charged strikes ignite an explosive blast at range.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnGhoulSaw.display_description: The cruelest of weapons built for the crudest of Grineer soldiers. Rips through metal like flesh, and through flesh like day-old pudding.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnEgyptSwd.display_description: This hooked blade rewards critical hits to those skilled enough to strike with finesse.
Battlefield butchery becomes all too easy with a Krohkur blade in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnDualFire.display_description: These nasty, little hatchets slice through steel as if it were flesh.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrnBoomeran.display_description: A different take on the throwing mace, the Halikar Wraith features unique styling.
This jet powered Grineer throwing mace always comes back to its master and is even capable of disarming targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerWhip.display_description: A multi-bladed whip that is adept at flaying skin from bone. In extreme cases, disobedient Grineer are sentenced to death by Atterax.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerTylA.display_description: Tyl Regor's custom axe and shield are how he likes to eliminate ‘frustrations'.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerMach.display_description: A different take on a familiar combat knife, the Machete Wraith features unique styling.
The addition of Prisma Crystal allows this otherwise barbaric weapon to elegantly hack through any foe.
Blades of energized prisma crystal make these ornamental cleavers cut as sharply as they look.
A ferocious Melee Weapon crafted by the Grineer and carried by their elite melee forces.
Butcher your foes with brutal blades in each hand.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerJetP.display_description: Deliver crushing blows with this Grineer built, jet powered mace.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerHalb.display_description: Slice through mobs of unruly enemies with this fierce halberd; the signature weapon of the Kuva Guardians.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Melee/GrineerComb.display_description: Built for close combat, the Sheev's plasma blade slices through flesh and armor with equal ease.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/WraithGo.display_description: The Gorgon Wraith is a powerful variant of its precursor that features unique styling.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/VoidTrad.display_description: Adorned with void hardened prisma crystal, this Gorgon variant is prized for its beauty and enhanced mechanics.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/LaserAim.display_description: Pick off targets by highlighting distant enemies using this Grineer rifle's advanced laser sighting system. Deadly in both single fire and automatic modes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnSpark.display_description: For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnOroki.display_description: Long before clone-rot set in, elite Grineer Commanders protected the surviving Orokin from rebelling Warframes with these formidable rifles. When Gotva Prime inflicts a Status Effect, its next shot has a chance to be a Super Critical hit.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnKuvaL.display_description: Detonate heads with this slow-firing rifle that rewards precision.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnHarpo.display_description: Spike enemies to the wall or reel them in with this burst harpoon gun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnGrena.display_description: Hurl mayhem and destruction with this Grineer grenade launcher.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnGorgS.display_description: Mark your targets and unleash a barrage of bullets, the Buzlok's homing rounds always find the enemy. Marked targets are more likely to take critical hits.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnFourB.display_description: Annihilate targets with four simultaneous shots from this high-caliber Grineer rifle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnFlame.display_description: Launch super-heated slugs at individual foes, or hurl the entire weapon and ignite groups of enemies in a flash inferno.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrnCanno.display_description: Unload a barrage of explosives or a huge shot of flak from this cannon’s enormous barrel.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrineerS.display_description: A blood-red variant of this devastating sniper rifle.
Built by the Grineer for their elite troopers, the Vulkar is a devastating distance weapon. In the right hands it is capable of taking down targets long before they get into attack range.
The Miter launches high velocity saw blades, tearing apart anyone unfortunate enough to be in their path.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrineerM.display_description: A different take on the Grineer assault rifle, the Karak Wraith features unique styling.
Solid, dependable and deadly. The Karak is a standard issue rifle in many Grineer platoons.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrineerL.display_description: Prisma-crystal enhancement creates here a prestige instrument; a weapon capable of taking life at astonishing range with but a single pull of its exquisitely-tooled trigger.
With pinpoint accuracy, the Grinlok lever-action repeating rifle can easily find the soft spot on any target.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrineerF.display_description: The Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/GrineerA.display_description: When one Grakata isn't enough, bring another for extra firepower.
Equipped with a huge Magazine and impressive Fire Rate, the Grakata is the preferred weapon of Grineer Lancers.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/LongGuns/BurstRif.display_description: A powerful mid-range rifle used by Grineer shock troops, the Hind fires in five round bursts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/KuvaLich/Secondar.display_description: Double-fist rapid-fire bursts of pain with these dual-wield variants of the Grineer submachine gun. Higher Fire Rate and Magazine Capacity.
This variant pistol has higher fire rate and magazine capacity. Superior zoom capabilities plus projectiles have a small Corrosive burst.
A highly-optimized Nukor that allows for the weapon’s microwave field to hit up to two additional targets.
A custom variant that fires three quick shots with a single pull of the trigger, or can alt-fire burst the remainder of its magazine. Higher Fire Rate, Magazine Capacity and Reload Speed.
This Lich-variant semi-automatic hand cannon delivers a lot of punch in a small package. Higher fire rate, magazine capacity and reload speed.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/KuvaLich/Melee/Gh.display_description: The addition of Kuva has forged the savage Ghoulsaw into an even more brutal weapon, allowing for faster attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/KuvaLich/LongGuns.display_description: An even stronger Zarr cannon to meet the demands of Kuva Liches. With stronger explosive barrages, and long-range flak shots.
This Lich-variant grenade launcher hurls mayhem and destruction with an increased Reload Speed.
The Kuva Sobek's exceptional Reload Speed, Critical Chance, and Status Chance make it a natural fit for the Kuva Lich's dominant spirit.
Unlike a standard Quartakk this Kuva Lich variant fires automatically from the hip while retaining its signature feature when aimed: annihilating targets with four simultaneous shots.
The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. Unlike the basic version the Kuva Ogris fires detonite-infused casings semi-automatically, from a smaller magazine, while dealing greater damage per shot.
The Kuva Kohm variant has a higher fire rate than the original. For every shot fired in rapid succession the Kuva Kohm releases an additional bolt and grows more lethal.
The custom weapon of a fearsome Kuva Lich. It has greater reload speed, lower recoil and greater accuracy than the standard-issue Karak rifle.
This powerful Grineer burst rifle has been retrofitted to add semi-automatic and automatic fire modes.
Forged at the behest of the Worm Queen herself, this already powerful shotgun now has the additional ability to fire from all four barrels simultaneously.

The Kuva Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room that do not slow down. Larger Magazine Capacity and Reload Speed. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/KuvaLich/HeavyWea.display_description: Reconfigured for maximum lethality, the Kuva Grattler still shatters targets with explosive shells, but now reaches maximum fire-rate instantaneously.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/HeavyWeapons/GrnH.display_description: Sweep aside hordes of enemies with flaming fury of this powerful, automatic, grenade launching archgun.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/GrineerPistol/Grn.display_description: Captain Vor's prized Orokin-Grineer hybrid pistol has an average rate of fire, but it has high damage and superior zoom capabilities.
The Kraken is a heavy pistol of Grineer design that fires two quick shots with a single pull of the trigger. Skilled marksmen will appreciate the value in this deadly accurate weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/GrineerPistol/Gri.display_description: A full-auto pistol known as the most compact and lightweight weapon of the Grineer arsenal. Though it has a small Magazine Capacity, the Viper has a very high Fire Rate and ultra-fast reload times thanks to a simplified magazine design.
Designed as a pair, these Grineer sidearms fire projectiles at a slower rate but with greater force and accuracy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Grineer/Bows/GrnBow/GrnBo.display_description: This Grineer bow delivers vengeance in the form of clusterbomb-tipped arrows that can be detonated mid-air or on impact. Low quiver capacity, arrows are recovered singly.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/SniperPist.display_description: This scoped pistol analyzes strikes, learning how to damage its targets most effectively. Achieve maximum damage output after five successive hits.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpSonific.display_description: Cultivate a meaningful relationship with this deceptively simple battery-powered pistol. The Plinx rewards attention and investment from the wise.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpSentExp.display_description: A weapon that reaches for its next victim even as it kills. With each takedown, this pistol spawns an energy tendril that reaches for a nearby target.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpSentAma.display_description: Sentient tech merges with Corpus design to deliver this lethal sidearm. Fully automatic, it fires ricocheting, homing projectiles that release small clouds of <DT_GAS_COLOR>Gas on impact. Alt-fire to release the entire magazine without homing as a single burst.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpIgniter.display_description: Dominate rivals with this pistol’s lightning fast rail-slugs. Head-shots speed up reload.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpHandRL/.display_description: Imbued with the finest Prisma crystal, this refined Angstrum features boosted charge and reload speeds.
Capable of firing multiple rockets at once, the Angstrum is a handheld instrument of destruction.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpElectro.display_description: Send a massive charge of potential energy hurling toward unfortunate targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpChargeG.display_description: Forgo ammunition with the regenerating energy disc in this plasma throwing pistol.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpBriefca.display_description: Itemize and execute with this pair of auto-lock-on, homing-projectile pistols. Shoot from-hip for a more conventional pistol experience. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the pistols when holstered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CrpAirPist.display_description: Blasts targets with a massive wave of sonic energy. Results reported to be: 'Very Satisfying'.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CorpusModu.display_description: A special-order Corpus cutting tool for master crafters only. Features distinctive azurite plating and a focusing crystal of precision clarity and cut.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CorpusMini.display_description: Wield two Cestras to unleash a dual torrent of high energy bolts.
Compact and deadly, the Cestra discharges bolts of energy at an increasingly rapid rate.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Pistols/CorpusHand.display_description: The sleek lines of the Detron conceal its ferocious nature. The hand cannon's semi-automatic action takes down enemies with speed and efficiency.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Whips/CrpSho.display_description: Shock and maim with this heavyweight retractable whip.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Whip/CorpusW.display_description: Half taser, half whip. The Corpus Lecta delivers a deadly shock to anything it touches.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/ShieldAndSwo.display_description: Drive the agenda with this massive impact hammer. Heavy attacks launch devastating energy disks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Polearm/Corp.display_description: Developed as an energy saw to scrap obsolete ships, this tool was quickly banned when rebels in the Sedna region discovered it also made an excellent weapon.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/KickAndPunch.display_description: Dazzle, distract and destroy with these sparring weapons of impossibly hard prisma crystal.
The Obex system multiplies the kinetic energy of a Tenno's kicks and punches, delivering devastating blows to any target.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Hammer/Corpu.display_description: Each successive kill from this massive electron hammer builds an electron charge that is unleashed on slam attacks.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Gunblade/Crp.display_description: A short-blade melee weapon with an ace up its sleeve. Send nearby enemies flying with a powerful short-range shockwave.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Glaive/CrpGl.display_description: Carve through enemies with surgical precision using this Corpus-tech glaive.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/Glaive/CrpGh.display_description: An obscure glaive weapon of Corpus provenance, intrinsically linked to Specter technology. The Xoris strikes rapidly and with great devastation. It is capable of chaining combos infinitely.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/CrpVenusHatc.display_description: This unsophisticated Corpus survival tool does what it was designed for: hacking and splitting whatever it strikes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/CrpTonfa/Crp.display_description: Bring the enemy to its knees with these twin electrified tonfas.
Prisma crystals glisten in these electrified tonfas.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Melee/CrpBriefcase.display_description: On Heavy Slide Attack, this Corpus scythe launches a spinning energy disk that ricochets throughout the battlefield. Its lifetime is derived from the size of the Combo Counter. Note: The Granum Attaché system pauses the combo timer when holstered.

The sleek lines of the Granum Attaché case conceal an infinitely sharp two-handed blade. Blocked attacks have a chance to increase the blocking angle. Note: The Granum Attaché system pauses the combo timer when holstered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/Spears/Ra.display_description: Discharge a rail of ionized death or throw the Ferrox like a spear and create a localized field of attraction no enemy can escape from.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/Machinegu.display_description: A customized version of the powerful Supra, featuring a metallic finish and Lotus decal.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/GrenadeLa.display_description: The Penta Launcher fires up to five grenades that can be remotely triggered at just the right moment.
Enveloped in deep red composite enamel, this Penta variant features a higher fire-rate and over-sized magazine.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpSplitL.display_description: When its twin-lasers converge on a target a circuit is created, frying the subject.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpShotgu.display_description: Stagger targets with blasts from this Corpus engineered plasma shotgun. Surviving enemies are consumed with radiation.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpShockR.display_description: A customized version of the Quanta, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.
This weapon was designed to assist with the excavation of mineral deposits from large asteroids, but has been adapted for military purposes.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpShapeB.display_description: Feel the kick of this Corpus shotgun as it shatters a high-yield crystal into anyone and anything standing in your way.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpSentEx.display_description: A weapon that builds charge the more it kills. Hit capacity then release for an obliterating discharge of power.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpSentAm.display_description: Corpus ingenuity leveraging Tau-tech to create a high-capacity bi-modal sniper weapon of terrifying capability. Zoom in to reduce recoil and add punch through. Zoom again to fire a bursting viral round, but with a lower rate of fire. Komorex features built-in ammo conversion.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpRubanR.display_description: Nail them to the wall! The Stahlta automatic rifle propels hardened steel rods at high speed, while a charged fire mode fuses a number of volatile rods together for a large radioactive explosion.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpFreeze.display_description: Fires a photon beam that halts molecular vibrations, causing instant and painful freezing.
A cutting-edge, halogen-cooled electron accelerator capable of snap-freezing a target in moments.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpBriefc.display_description: This discreet rocket launcher is equally at home in a board meeting or on a casual outing. Aimed rockets are wire-guided for greater accuracy, but travel more slowly. The patented Granum Attaché System reloads the weapon when holstered.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpBFG/Cr.display_description: Once charged this Corpus laser cannon dispatches a devastating blast of light energy.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpBFG/Va.display_description: With a precision crafted lens, this customized Opticor achieves a level of performance previously thought impossible.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CrpArSnip.display_description: Bring negotiations to an instant conclusion with this Corpus assault rifle. Switch effortlessly between charged explosive shots and rapid-fire electrical assault mode.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/CorpusUMP.display_description: When bathed in Void energy and prisma crystal, the simple Tetra becomes a beacon of style and intimidation.
Drawing from its huge quad-chambered magazine, the Tetra is capable of unleashing a sustained barrage of lethal energy bolts.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/LongGuns/ChainLigh.display_description: The Amprex rifle fires a continuous beam of high voltage electricity that arcs among nearby enemies. This weapon excels at Crowd Control.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Bow/Longbow/CrpBow.display_description:
Bolts from this Corpus bow deliver a one-two punch of an icy pulse, followed by a conventional explosion. Excess ammo picked up for other weapons will be converted into charges for the Lenz. 

Warning: Safety-protocols do not exist on this prototype.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/Bow/Longbow/Prisma.display_description: The explosive potential of the Lenz, enhanced with Prisma crystals.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/BoardExec/Secondar.display_description: Alternate fire on this reengineered Plinx fires a projectile that pulls enemies close and then explodes. Its cooldown increases after the explosion to accommodate battery power demands.
Parvos Granum's engineers have made this already ferocious hand cannon even more deadly with the addition of an alternate fire mode that empties an entire clip in one devastating burst.
This reengineered Cycron features a refracting energy disc that can split off the main target, hitting up to 2 additional nearby targets.

/Lotus/Weapons/Corpus/BoardExec/Primary/.display_description: Parvosian upgrade of the classic Tetra. Slower fire rate but with a larger magazine. Can now alt-fire entire clip as a large burst radius grenade launcher.
Once a mining tool adapted for military purposes, Parvosian engineering has enhanced the Quanta's lethality even further.
Advances in microelectronics have improved a Corpus classic. Tenet Glaxion’s photon beam strikes up to four enemies at once. It also boasts superior Damage, Critical Chance, and Status Chance.
Sister-modified Flux Rifle with increased fire rate and range. Recharge has been replaced with ammo clips to accommodate greater power needs.
The expert engineers in Parvos Granum’s division have optimized the Ferrox’s lethal power.
Custom variant of a Corpus classic. Staggering blasts now ricochet and have greater range at the cost of a slower fire and reload speed. Surviving enemies are consumed with radiation.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/VandalEle.display_description: A customized version of the vicious Prova, with metallic finish and Lotus decal.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/Railgun.display_description: The Lanka fires a high velocity projectile through magnetic induction.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/EnergyRif.display_description: The Dera is a repeater that fires super-heated plasma.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/ElectroPr.display_description: The Prova is a Melee Weapon that delivers a high-intensity shock to its target.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/DeraVanda.display_description: A customized version of the Dera, featuring a metallic finish and Lotus decal.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/CrpLaserR.display_description: Laser Rifle with Corpus safe-guards removed.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/CrpLaserP.display_description: While its intended design is for deep space construction, the concentrated laser beam of the Spectra is highly effective against organic and synthetic enemies.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Energy/CrpHeavyR.display_description: The SUPRA is a heavy laser gun with a short wind up time.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Chemical/FlameTh.display_description: A blood-red variant of this destructive flamethrower.
Ignis produces a stream of intense heat.

/Lotus/Weapons/ClanTech/Bio/AcidDartPist.display_description: The Acrid fires an acidic-infused needle.

/Lotus/Weapons/Cephalon/Primary/CephPrim.display_description: Creates miniature gravitational singularities that can be used for scientific study or self-defense.

warnings: Behaviour 0 has no recognized damage components.

/Lotus/Weapons/Cephalon/Melee/Hammer/Cep.display_description: Obtain enlightenment with this massive hammer that performs a Codex scan on each fatal strike. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

/Lotus/Weapons/Archon/Melee/Whip/ArchonW.display_description: Archon Nira’s spine-shattering whip. Has a unique Tactical Combo that whips out a wide wave of energy with each stroke.

/Lotus/Weapons/Archon/Melee/Trident/Arch.display_description: Archon Boreal’s signature trident. Thrust Korumm into the ground with a Tactical Combo and then rip it out in a shower of electricity.

/Lotus/Weapons/Archon/Melee/DualDaggers/.display_description: The dual flaming fang-blades of the Archon Amar. Has a unique Neutral Combo that blasts out four short-range fireballs.

/Lotus/Types/JadeShadowsPart2Mission/Ene.display_description: The Imperator Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the barrel.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/S.display_description: Designed as the perfect mate for Nautilus, this Sentinel weapon projects an icy beam at nearby targets.
The icy signature weapon of Nautilus Prime.
Standard issue weapon for Carrier Sentinel. Fires shotgun rounds.
Causes the Helios Sentinel to attack enemy targets using pieces of itself.
Standard issue sniper rifle for Diriga.
Standard issue weapon for Djinn Sentinel. Fires <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin projectiles that embed into enemies and continuously deal damage for 3 seconds.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/P.display_description: Fires a small burst of lasers.
Standard issue weapon for Carrier Prime Sentinel. Fires shotgun rounds.
Signature default weapon of Dethcube Prime.
Shade Prime’s signature weapon fires laser bursts.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/L.display_description: A laser rifle developed by reverse-engineering Corpus technology.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/G.display_description: Freeze targets in their tracks with this sentinel mounted ice-beam.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/D.display_description: Standard issue weaponry signature to Dethcube.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/B.display_description: Fires a small burst of lasers.

/Lotus/Types/Sentinels/SentinelWeapons/D.display_description: Allows the Helios Prime to violently disassemble and turn itself into a deadly projectile.

/Lotus/Types/Friendly/Pets/MoaPets/MoaPe.display_description: Charges up a powerful blast of ultra-heated plasma.
Releases a burst of static electricity that can jump between foes, incapacitating them.
Launches a volley of bomb darts that embed themselves in targets, exploding a short time later.
Fires volleys of icy grenades that inflict a lingering chill on the blast zone.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wraith/ReaperMeleeWeap.display_description: These razor-sharp blades of condensed Void energy inflict deep and grievous wounds.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Wraith/SevagothShadowP.display_description: The claws of the shadowy helmsman have cast many foolish foes into the cold below.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Ranger/ExaltedBow.display_description: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Pagemaster/ExaltedBook.display_description: Wield the power of Dante's chronicles. Customize Noctua with Tome Mods that enhance Warframe Abilities and reward strategic combat. Primary attack releases pages that tear into lethal pieces on hits. Its alternate attack releases a wave with infinite Punch Through.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Pacifist/PacifistFist.display_description: Baruuk channels the desert wind to turn his fists and feet into an exalted weapon.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Pacifist/PacifistFistP.display_description: Baruuk Prime channels the Desert Wind to turn his fists and feet into an exalted prime weapon.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Ninja/NinjaStormWeapon.display_description: Ash's fearsome Shadow Clones, as projected by his Blade Storm ability.
Ash Prime's fearsome Shadow Clones, as projected by his Blade Storm ability.

/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/WukongPrime.display_description: A unique staff wielded by the Wukong Prime Warframe.

/Lotus/Powersuits/MonkeyKing/MonkeyKingS.display_description: A unique staff wielded by the Wukong Warframe.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Khora/KhoraWhipclawWea.display_description: Khora Prime's deadly exalted whip, unleased by her Whipclaw ability.
Khora's deadly exalted whip, unleased by her Whipclaw ability.

/Lotus/Powersuits/IronFrame/BlastWeaponP.display_description: Charge and release powerful bolts of balefire.

/Lotus/Powersuits/IronFrame/BlastWeapon.display_description: Charges up and releases bolts of Balefire.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Garuda/GarudaClaws.display_description: These nasty things come out when Garuda forgoes a melee weapon.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Frumentarius/ExaltedSn.display_description: Cyte-09’s exalted Sniper Rifle. Bullets ricochet off Weak Points to seek out other nearby Weak Points. /Lotus/Powersuits/Fairy/PrimeFlightPisto.display_description: Take flight with Razorwing and summon these mighty dual pistols.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Fairy/PrimeFlightSword.display_description: Take flight with Razorwing and summon this formidable heavy blade.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Fairy/FlightPistols.display_description: Take flight with Razorwing and summon these mighty dual pistols.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Excalibur/DoomSwordUmb.display_description: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Excalibur/DoomSwordPri.display_description: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.

/Lotus/Powersuits/Choir/ChoirEruptWeapon.display_description: Unleash the power of the Jade Light.
